column1: Is this her camera? - No, it is________ . (HE)
Come with_______ . I can't go there alone. (I)
Nobody will help__________ . We'll have to do everything___________ . (WE/WE)
Is that Olga's chair? - No, it's___________, _____________is over there. (YOU/SHE)
There is a box of____________on the shelf. (MATCH)
